title: Google AI Essentials
description: Learn foundational AI concepts, responsible AI practices, and how to use AI tools to boost productivity.

title: Elements of AI
description: A free online course introducing AI concepts — what AI is, what it can and can't do, and how it affects our lives.

title: Microsoft AI for Beginners
description: A 12-week, 24-lesson curriculum covering symbolic AI, neural networks, computer vision, NLP, and generative AI.

title: fast.ai — Practical Deep Learning for Coders
description: Top-down, hands-on approach to deep learning. Build real models from lesson 1. No PhD required.

title: Andrej Karpathy — Neural Networks: Zero to Hero
description: Build neural networks from scratch in Python. Covers backprop, GPT architecture, tokenization — by the former Tesla AI lead.

title: ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers
description: Isa Fulford & Andrew Ng teach best practices for prompt engineering — from summarization to inferring, transforming, and expanding.

title: Anthropic's Prompt Engineering Guide
description: Official guide covering system prompts, chain-of-thought, XML tags, role prompting, and advanced techniques for Claude.

title: OpenAI Prompt Engineering Guide
description: Strategies and tactics for getting better results from LLMs — clear instructions, reference text, split tasks, and more.

title: Brex Prompt Engineering Guide
description: Production-tested prompt patterns from Brex — covers system prompts, structured output, multi-turn, and real-world pitfalls.

title: LangChain Academy
description: Free hands-on courses on building with LangGraph — from chatbots to multi-agent systems with tool use and human-in-the-loop.

title: Building Agentic RAG with LlamaIndex
description: Build agentic RAG — agents that reason over documents, use tools, and plan multi-step retrieval strategies.

title: AI Agents in LangGraph
description: Build AI agents using LangGraph — learn agent architectures, persistence, human-in-the-loop, and multi-agent collaboration.

title: Anthropic Courses — Tool Use & Agents
description: Official Anthropic course on building agents with Claude — tool use, agentic loops, computer use, and real-world patterns.

title: CrewAI — Multi-Agent Framework Docs
description: Learn to build multi-agent systems with role-based agents, task delegation, and collaborative problem-solving.

title: Building RAG Applications — LlamaIndex
description: Build RAG from scratch — data ingestion, chunking, indexing, retrieval, and response synthesis with LlamaIndex.

title: Vector Databases: from Embeddings to Applications
description: Understand embeddings, vector search, and build applications with Weaviate — from theory to production.

title: Pinecone Learning Center
description: Comprehensive guides on embeddings, semantic search, hybrid search, metadata filtering, and production RAG patterns.

title: Chunking Strategies for RAG
description: Deep dive into document chunking — fixed-size, semantic, recursive, and document-aware strategies with benchmarks.

title: Red Teaming LLM Applications
description: Learn to probe LLMs for vulnerabilities — prompt injection, jailbreaks, data leakage, and bias using systematic red teaming.

title: Responsible AI with Google Cloud
description: Principles, tools, and governance frameworks for building responsible AI systems at scale.

title: OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications
description: The definitive security reference — top 10 vulnerabilities in LLM apps including prompt injection, insecure output, and data poisoning.

title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
description: The U.S. government framework for managing AI risks — governance, mapping, measuring, and managing AI system risks.

title: MLOps Zoomcamp
description: Free hands-on course covering experiment tracking (MLflow), orchestration, deployment, monitoring, and best practices.

title: LLM in Production — Hugging Face
description: Deploy LLMs to production — inference optimization, quantization (GPTQ, AWQ), serving with TGI, and scaling strategies.

title: Evaluating and Debugging Generative AI
description: Use W&B to track experiments, evaluate LLM outputs, debug generative AI pipelines, and build evaluation frameworks.

title: Full Stack LLM Bootcamp
description: End-to-end LLM app development — prompt engineering, LLM ops, UX design, augmented LLMs, and launch strategies.

title: Vercel AI SDK Documentation
description: Build AI-powered web apps with streaming, tool calling, multi-step agents, and structured outputs using the AI SDK.

title: OpenAI Cookbook
description: Production recipes — function calling, embeddings, fine-tuning, assistants API, structured outputs, and real-world patterns.

title: Hugging Face NLP Course
description: Learn transformers, tokenizers, fine-tuning, and the Hugging Face ecosystem — with hands-on Colab notebooks.

title: Stanford CS229 — Machine Learning
description: Andrew Ng's legendary ML course — supervised learning, deep learning, generalization, and practical ML advice.

title: Vibe Coding: Build Apps with AI
description: Learn the vibe coding approach — use AI tools like Cursor, Bolt, and Replit to build working apps by describing what you want in natural language.

title: AI for Everyone
description: Non-technical introduction to AI for business leaders — understand what AI can and cannot do, how to build an AI strategy, and navigate ethical concerns.

title: CS231n — Convolutional Neural Networks for Visual Recognition
description: Deep dive into computer vision — image classification, object detection, image generation, and neural network architectures for visual tasks.

title: Hugging Face Audio Course
description: Learn to work with audio data using transformers — speech recognition, text-to-speech, audio classification, and voice AI applications.

title: Generative AI for Enterprise — IBM
description: Enterprise perspective on generative AI — governance, scaling AI across teams, responsible implementation, and building business value.

title: MCP (Model Context Protocol) Documentation
description: Official specification and guides for building MCP servers and clients — connect AI assistants to external tools, APIs, and data sources through a universal protocol.

title: GitHub Copilot Documentation
description: Complete guide to GitHub Copilot — setup, chat, code review, custom instructions, agents, and MCP integration for AI-assisted development.

title: Building AI Agents with LangGraph — DeepLearning.AI
description: Build production-ready AI agents — state management, tool integration, human-in-the-loop, multi-agent systems, and deployment patterns.

title: Quantization Fundamentals with Hugging Face
description: Learn model quantization techniques — reduce model size and run LLMs efficiently on consumer hardware without significant quality loss.
